Moved Pool based tests from FWCore to IOPool
Remove SwitchProducer and ConditionalTask from the framework

Determine non-process name lookups at begin job

remove wf 24834.911
mkfit standalone bin file writer updates: track hit order and phase-2 OT cluster size
